info.description: Single edge-to-edge image with optional text overlay. Great for hero shots between sections.

image.description: Landscape photo, at least 1920px wide. The image fills the full screen width and is taller on desktop than mobile.

overlay_eyebrow.description: Small uppercase label that sits on top of the image. Example: 'On the boat'. Leave blank for a plain image with no text.

overlay_heading.description: Big heading that sits on top of the image. Leave blank for a plain image with no text.

overlay_body.description: One short paragraph below the heading (optional). Keep it tight — full-bleed images work best with minimal text.

overlay_position.description: Where the text sits on the image. Pick a position that doesn't cover the important part of the photo.

overlay_text_colour.description: Text colour for the overlay. Default cream looks good on most photos. Use #231F20 (near-black) if your photo is very pale.

overlay_darken.description: How much to dim the image so overlay text stays readable (0 = no dimming, 80 = very dark). Increase if your photo is bright.

min_height.description: How tall the image is. Short = ~40vh, Medium = ~60vh, Tall = ~80vh, Fullscreen = 100vh.

caption.description: Optional tiny caption shown below the image (outside the photo). Example credit line.
